summary: Rangers midfielder Raskin is reportedly seeking a transfer with interest from Atalanta. The transfer update also includes news about Hearts' managerial vacancy and Kilmarnock's goalkeeper signing.
content: Rangers midfielder linked with move, Hearts vacancy latest and Kilmarnock agree to sign goalkeeper.

zh.title: 拉斯金寻求离队 亚特兰大有意 - 转会八卦
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队中场拉斯金正在寻求转会，亚特兰大对其有意。转会消息还包括Hearts主教练空缺和基尔马诺克门将签约的相关报道。

title: Podcast: Game day - Scotland's World Cup nerve test
summary: A podcast episode previews Scotland's World Cup match against Morocco, discussing tactical approaches and team morale. The episode examines whether Scotland can advance in the tournament.
content: Scotland brace for Morocco—tactics, nerves and World Cup belief.

zh.title: 播客：比赛日 - 苏格兰世界杯紧张时刻
zh.summary: 一期播客节目预览了苏格兰对阵摩洛哥的世界杯比赛，讨论了战术方法和球队士气。该节目探讨了苏格兰是否能在比赛中晋级。

title: Scotland's totems must turn up to thwart dynamic Morocco
summary: Scotland must deliver their strongest performance under manager Steve Clarke to defeat Morocco and reach the knockout stage for the first time. The matchup against dynamic Morocco represents a critical challenge for advancement.
content: Scotland will need their best display since Steve Clarke took over to achieve the result against Morocco that will secure knockout tournament football for the first time, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 苏格兰主力球员必须挺身阻止势头强劲的摩洛哥
zh.summary: 苏格兰必须在主教练史蒂夫·克拉克的领导下发挥最强实力，击败摩洛哥并首次进入淘汰赛阶段。与势头强劲的摩洛哥的对阵是推进的关键挑战。

title: Korea GK gaffe helps Mexico clinch 1st in Group A
summary: Mexico defeated South Korea 1-0, capitalizing on a goalkeeper error, and became the first team to advance to the knockout stage. The victory secured top position in Group A for Mexico.
content: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

zh.title: 韩国门将失误助力墨西哥锁定A组榜首
zh.summary: 墨西哥以1-0击败韩国，利用门将失误，成为首支晋级淘汰赛阶段的球队。这场胜利确保了墨西哥在A组的榜首位置。

title: Canada's Koné stretchered off after hard tackle
summary: Canadian midfielder Ismaël Koné was removed from the field on a stretcher following a hard tackle during the second half of Canada's match against Qatar. The injury occurred at Vancouver's BC Place Stadium.
content: Canada midfielder Ismaël Koné was stretchered off the field in the second half of the host nation's match against Qatar on Thursday at BC Place in Vancouver.

zh.title: 加拿大球员科内遭硬铲抬担架离场
zh.summary: 加拿大中场球员伊斯迈尔·科内在加拿大对阵卡塔尔的比赛下半场遭硬铲后被抬担架离场。受伤事件发生在温哥华的BC体育馆。

title: Aguirre relishes Azteca return after Group A win
summary: Mexico's 1-0 victory over South Korea advanced them to the knockout stage and secured top spot in Group A. The team will play their Round of 32 match at the iconic Estadio Azteca stadium.
content: Mexico beat South Korea 1-0 to become the first team to advance to the World Cup knockout stage, securing the top spot in Group A and a dream Round of 32 match at the Estadio Azteca.

zh.title: 阿吉雷享受A组胜利后重返阿兹特卡
zh.summary: 墨西哥以1-0击败韩国晋级淘汰赛阶段，并锁定A组榜首。球队将在标志性的阿兹特卡体育场进行32强赛。

title: Pulisic still training solo a day before U.S. game...
summary: U.S. manager Mauricio Pochettino provided an update on Christian Pulisic's calf injury, saying the star attacker has improved. Pulisic's status for the upcoming match against Australia remains uncertain pending medical evaluation.
content: U.S. manager Maurico Pochettino said star attacker Christian Pulisic is "much better'" in terms of the injury to his left calf but will be assessed by the medical staff Thursday night to determine his availability to play against Australia on Friday.

zh.title: 普利西奇在美国队比赛前一天仍在单独训练
zh.summary: 美国队主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺对克里斯蒂安·普利西奇的小腿伤进行了更新,表示这位明星前锋已经有所改善。普利西奇在对阵澳大利亚的即将到来的比赛中的状态仍不确定,需要医学评估。

title: David hat trick leads Canada to historic WC rout
summary: Jonathan David scored a hat trick as Canada dominated Qatar 6-0 in a historic victory at home in Vancouver. The dominant performance moved Canada to the top of their World Cup group.
content: Jonathan David's hat trick propelled Canada to a historic 6-0 rout of Qatar in Vancouver on Thursday to go to the top of their World Cup group.

zh.title: 大卫帽子戏法领导加拿大创造世界杯历史性大胜
zh.summary: 乔纳森·大卫打入帽子戏法,加拿大在温哥华主场以6-0大胜卡塔尔,创造历史性胜利。这场压倒性的胜利使加拿大在世界杯小组中排名第一。

title: Messi's family confirm father has health issue
summary: Lionel Messi's family publicly confirmed that his father Jorge is dealing with a health issue. The announcement comes during the 2026 World Cup tournament.
content: The family of Lionel Messi confirmed on Thursday that the Argentina star's father, Jorge Messi, is currently experiencing a health issue.

zh.title: 梅西家族确认父亲身体有恙
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西的家族公开确认他的父亲豪尔赫正在处理一个健康问题。该声明是在2026世界杯期间发布的。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 12
summary: Readers are challenged to identify a mystery World Cup player in as few guesses as possible using an interactive guessing game. The feature tests knowledge of current tournament participants.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星第12号
zh.summary: 读者们需要使用互动猜谜游戏在尽可能少的猜测中识别一位神秘的世界杯球员。该功能考查对当前锦标赛参赛者的了解程度。

title: Hat-trick hero & Swiss wonderkid - World Cup duo set for Premier League?
summary: Canadian forward Jonathan David, who scored a hat-trick at the World Cup, and Swiss midfielder Johan Manzambi are being linked with potential moves to the Premier League. The feature examines whether these standout World Cup performers could join England's top division next season.
content: Will Canada hat-trick hero Jonathan David and Swiss goal-scoring midfielder Johan Manzambi be playing in the Premier League next season?

zh.title: 帽子戏法英雄与瑞士神童 - 世界杯组合将加盟英超？
zh.summary: 在世界杯上打入帽子戏法的加拿大前锋乔纳森·戴维德和瑞士中场约翰·曼赞比与英超转会传言相关联。该报道探讨了这两位世界杯表现出色的球员是否能在下赛季加入英格兰顶级联赛。

title: A day of tears, scuffles & history as injury mars Canada's moment
summary: Canada's historic first-ever World Cup finals victory was marred by a serious injury to midfielder Ismael Kone that sparked emotional scenes and tensions on the pitch. The win represented a landmark achievement for the nation but was overshadowed by the injury controversy.
content: Canada's first-ever win at a World Cup finals should have been cause for pure joy - but was overshadowed by a horrific injury to Ismael Kone, and the angry and emotional scenes that followed.

zh.title: 泪水、冲突与历史——加拿大时刻被伤病玷污的一天
zh.summary: 加拿大历史性的首次世界杯决赛胜利被中场球员伊斯梅尔·科内的严重伤病所破坏，引发了情感场面和球场紧张局势。这场胜利代表了该国的里程碑式成就，但被伤病争议所掩盖。

title: Tuchel throws first pitch as England enjoy downtime
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel takes a break from World Cup duties to throw a ceremonial first pitch at a baseball game as the team enjoys some downtime at the tournament. Ivan Toney scored a hat-trick in a friendly match against MLS side Sporting KC during the break.
content: Thomas Tuchel takes some time out at a baseball game as England enjoy some downtime at the World Cup - while Ivan Toney scores a hat-trick in a friendly against MLS side Sporting KC.

zh.title: 图赫尔投出首投球，英格兰队享受休息放松时光
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在世界杯期间休息，在棒球比赛中投出仪式性首投球，球队享受比赛期间的休息时间。伊万·托尼在与MLS球队体育堪萨斯城的友谊赛中打进帽子戏法。

title: Canada score six but historic win marred by Kone injury
summary: Canada celebrated their first-ever World Cup finals victory with a dominant 6-0 win against a nine-man Qatar side, but the historic achievement was overshadowed by a serious injury to midfielder Ismael Kone that left manager Jesse Marsch visibly emotional. The injury sparked controversy and tainted what should have been a purely celebratory milestone.
content: Ismael Kone's serious-looking injury left Canada manager Jesse Marsch in tears and overshadowed their first-ever World Cup finals win as they thrashed nine-man Qatar 6-0.

zh.title: 加拿大6:0领先，但历史性胜利因科内伤病而蒙上阴影
zh.summary: 加拿大以6:0的绝对优势战胜九人卡塔尔队，庆祝了他们历史性的首次世界杯决赛胜利，但这一成就被中场球员伊斯梅尔·科内的严重伤病所掩盖，主教练杰西·马什明显情绪激动。这次伤病引发了争议，玷污了本应是纯粹庆祝的里程碑时刻。

title: Kone injury is a 'huge loss' - Marsch
summary: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praised his team's 6-0 victory over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but expressed concern over losing midfielder Ismael Kone to a serious injury. The coach described the absence as a significant setback for the team's campaign.
content: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praises his players for their 6-0 win over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but says losing Ismael Kone to a serious-looking injury is a "huge loss".

zh.title: Kone受伤是'重大损失' - Marsch
zh.summary: 加拿大主教练杰西·马尔施称赞他的球队在2026年温哥华世界杯上6-0战胜卡塔尔，但对中场球员伊斯梅尔·科内因严重伤病而缺阵表示担忧。主教练称这一缺阵是球队赛事的重大挫折。
